MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brilliant, Esq. for Plaintiff
Bruce Sandifer, Property Manager for Plaintiff, Gerda Kircher
Sean Cooper, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled.
Six page written stipulation for entry of judgment was read into the record. The basic terms ware as follows:
Defendant retains possession of premises located at:1544 Polk St. #1, SF, CA. if
the provisions outlined in the six page agreement are met.
Parties will submitt written stipulation for entry of judgment using proper form per CRC 201 re: Format of First Page.
Jury trial vacated.
